# Sample scripttest file for OAuth2 testing

# Start the server
exec mcp-server start
stdout 'Server started'

# Test basic authentication
exec mcp-tool call authenticate '{"username": "test", "password": "pass"}'
stdout '{"token": "'

# Wait for initialization
exec sleep 1

# Test API access
exec mcp-tool call api_get '{"endpoint": "/users"}'
stdout '{"users": ['

# Test with invalid token
exec mcp-tool call api_get '{"endpoint": "/users", "token": "invalid"}'
stderr 'Unauthorized'

# Test token refresh
exec mcp-tool call refresh_token '{"refresh": "token123"}'
stdout '{"access_token": "'

# Cleanup
exec mcp-server stop
stdout 'Server stopped'
